name: SIS Kelapa Gading

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Pegangsaan Dua No.83, Kelapa Gading, Jakarta Utara, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents say SIS Kelapa Gading is the budget-conscious choice for families in North Jakarta who still want Cambridge and IB options.
paragraphs: Parents say SIS Kelapa Gading is the budget-conscious choice for families in North Jakarta who still want Cambridge and IB options.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.4K – US$10K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Kelapa Gading campus, Swimming pool, Science laboratories, Libraries, Football field.
